failures.description: The agent called ProductCatalogSearch with invalid arguments: it used product_id 0 instead of the provided string product_id "1762337868" and omitted the required item_id "1345513440". The tool rejected the call with a schema error, so no evidence was retrieved and the task could not be completed.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to retrieve the price of item 1345513440 using ProductCatalogSearch with the available item_id and product_id. The required parameters were already available in index 1: item_id "1345513440" and product_id "1762337868". At index 2, the Researcher prepared an invalid tool call with tool_args {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and changing product_id to an integer value not grounded in the input. At index 3, the tool explicitly returned a SchemaError stating it requires string product_id and item_id. This is a malformed tool invocation, not an infrastructure, access, or reasoning-over-output failure.
